meta.name: Low Profile Universal Stopper®
meta.description: Low profile protective cover for manual call points, buttons and key switches
meta.heroTitle: Low profile protective cover with sounder and LED indicator, IP54
meta.heroDescription:
Low profile polycarbonate cover for manual fire alarm call points, buttons and key switches. IP54-rated configurations provide protection against dust and water spray.

Available with sounder, LED indicator and labelled hood. Supports flush mount, surface mount with clear spacer and surface mount with coloured spacer frame.

Designed for indoor and outdoor installation where protection against unauthorised access or accidental activation is required.

options.1: #1 Surface Mount - Clear/Open Backed Spacer (Dual Mount)
options.2: #2 Surface Mount with Matching Coloured Frame
